::: {.r-vstack}
::: {style="margin-bottom: 1em;"}
The week
:::

::: {id="curly-brace"}
::: {.brace id="left"}
:::

::: {.brace id="right"}
:::
:::

::: {.r-hstack}
::: {data-id="box1" auto-animate-delay="0" style="background: #44709a; width: 500px; height: 75px; color: #FFFFFF; text-align: center;"}
::: {.fragment .fade-right fragment-index=1}
Lessons
:::
:::

::: {data-id="box2" auto-animate-delay="0.1" style="background: #ef6331; width: 300px; height: 75px; color: #FFFFFF; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle;"}
::: {.fragment .fade-left fragment-index=2}
Milestone
:::
:::
:::

::: {.r-hstack}
::: {style="background: #FFFFFF; width: 466px;"}
:::

::: {style="transform:rotate(45deg); font-size: 0.7em; margin-top: 4.7em;"}
:::


::: {style="transform:rotate(45deg); font-size: 0.7em; margin-top: 2.95em;"}
:::

:::
:::
